---
title: Approximation
author: JK
date: '2020-09-04'
slug: approximation
categories:
  - Math
  - Machine learning
  - Convex optimization

  - Convex optimization
  - Deep Learning
  - Machine learning
  - Math

summary: ''

  caption: ''
  focal_point: ''
  preview_only: no
projects: []
---

Line search

step, search direction $\Delta x}$
